task_objective: Implement the Wherewolf local SQL workbench with Streamlit, DuckDB, Spark, and SQL translation.
design_decisions: Reserved 'dataset' table name for easy query writing.
Modular engine structure (DuckDB/Spark) with a unified QueryResult.
Streamlit for the UI with session-based execution tracking.
results: Completed core features: SQL execution, translation, history, and export. All tests passing (DuckDB focused).
